name: Norris Industries, Inc.
summary: Norris Industries, Inc. acquires, explores for, and develops crude oil and natural gas properties in Texas. The company's principal properties are located in the Ellenberger formation in Coleman County, as well as the Jack and Palo-Pinto Counties. As of March 1, 2020, it had total proved reserves of approximately 29 thousands of barrels of oil and 150 millions of cubic feet of gas. The company was formerly known as International Western Petroleum, Inc. and changed its name to Norris Industries, Inc. in February 2018. Norris Industries, Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Weatherford, Texas.
